system.description: Pyrokinetic adventurer who turns instinctive fire control into a terrifying battlefield advantage.
system.notes: Play the Burster as a self-confident fire wielder whose signature abilities are unique pyrokinetic talents rather than ordinary catalog powers.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak American and one additional language at 90% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Impervious to Fire and Heat
grantedAbilities.notes: Treat fire and heat as harmless to the character and all worn gear. Mega-damage plasma, napalm, and magic fire inflict one-tenth normal damage from impact only, while electricity inflicts half damage.

grantedAbilities.name: Extinguish Fires
grantedAbilities.notes: Spend 4 I.S.P. to snuff out ordinary flames within range until they are reignited by another source.

grantedAbilities.name: Flame Burst
grantedAbilities.notes: Sheathe the body in fire for two minutes per level. Anything touched takes 6D6 S.D.C. and combustible items catch fire.

grantedAbilities.name: Fire Bolt
grantedAbilities.notes: Hurl mini, medium, heavy, or mega-damage plasma bolts of fire. The attack gains +4 to strike and scales by the chosen bolt size.

grantedAbilities.name: Fire Eruption
grantedAbilities.notes: Create a fire in a visible spot or known nearby area. Roll the listed base skill to place the eruption exactly where intended; a failed roll sends it 2D6 yards/meters off target.

grantedAbilities.name: Sense Fire
grantedAbilities.notes: Pause and concentrate to sense nearby fire, whether it is spreading, and whether it was started naturally, deliberately, or by magic.

grantedAbilities.name: Super Fuel Flame
grantedAbilities.notes: Feed an existing fire with psychic energy to multiply its size and damage over a wide area.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Start with Hand to Hand: Basic. Trade one other-skill pick for Expert, or two for Martial Arts (or Assassin for evil alignments).

grantedAbilities.name: Ley Line Amplification
grantedAbilities.notes: Increase range and duration by 50% near a ley line and double range, duration, and damage near a nexus point.

unresolvedNotes: Roll 2D6 for permanent P.P.E. and M.E. plus 3D4x10 for starting I.S.P. during character creation.
Other-skill selections may also be spent on weapon proficiencies from the existing W.P. catalog; mixed skill-versus-W.P. spending stays table-managed.
Starting money and saleable black market items are formula-based and should be rolled from the class text.

system.description: Predatory psychic hunter who tracks magic, psionics, and the supernatural like prey and survives by draining P.P.E.
system.notes: Use the Coalition or civilized skill package as the default chassis. The wild variant remains available through the class notes and manual adjustments.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak American and one additional language at 96% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Sense Psychic and Magic Energy
grantedAbilities.notes: Automatically detect nearby psychic and magic signatures and track the scent trail with the listed percentage rolls from the class text.

grantedAbilities.name: Sense Supernatural Beings
grantedAbilities.notes: Automatically feel the presence of supernatural beings and track them by their psychic scent with the class percentages.

grantedAbilities.name: P.P.E. Feeding
grantedAbilities.notes: Feed on at least 50 P.P.E. each week, preferably more. The stalker may drain captured prey without killing or absorb doubled P.P.E. at the instant a victim dies.

grantedAbilities.name: Animal Empathy
grantedAbilities.notes: Domestic and most wild animals accept the stalker as another creature of the wild. Use the stated bonuses when riding, handling, or moving among animals.

grantedAbilities.name: Magic and Horror Resistance
grantedAbilities.notes: Apply the listed save bonuses versus psionics, magic, horror factor, mind-altering drugs, and similar effects directly from the class text.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Start with Hand to Hand: Expert in the civilized package. Wild stalkers start with Hand to Hand: Basic and may upgrade it by spending other-skill picks as described in the class text.

grantedAbilities.name: Wild Psi-Stalker Variant
grantedAbilities.notes: To play a wild stalker, replace the civilized skill package with the wilderness-heavy alternate package from the class text, choose three ancient and two modern W.P.s, and use the wild starting equipment and money.

grantedAbilities.name: Ley Line Sensitivity
grantedAbilities.notes: Ley lines interfere with scent tracking, but the remaining psychic abilities gain the range and duration increases listed in the class text.

unresolvedNotes: Roll the listed 1D6 increases to M.E. and P.E., plus 2D6 to Spd, during character creation.
Roll 2D6 for permanent P.P.E. and M.E. plus 1D6x10 for starting I.S.P. during character creation.
The two open weapon proficiency picks shown here represent the civilized package. The wild package uses three ancient and two modern W.P. selections instead.
Other-skill selections may also be spent on weapon proficiencies from the existing W.P. catalog; mixed skill-versus-W.P. spending stays table-managed.
Coalition versus mercenary starting gear and money remain a table choice.

system.description: Coalition-bred mutant dog soldier with psychic senses, pack instincts, and the loyalty of a battlefield hunter.
system.notes: Play the Dog Pack soldier as a trained Coalition psi-hound first. The deserter or mercenary variant changes gear and circumstances, not the core training.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak American and Dragonese at 90% efficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Psychic Scent Tracking
grantedAbilities.notes: Use the class percentages to sense psychic, magical, and supernatural prey and to follow the scent trail like a bloodhound.

grantedAbilities.name: Superior Sense of Smell
grantedAbilities.notes: Use smell-based rolls to recognize odors, identify specific scents, and track by scent alone, even through darkness.

grantedAbilities.name: Keen Hearing and Hunter Instincts
grantedAbilities.notes: Apply the class combat and initiative bonuses as part of the mutant dog's hardwired hunting reflexes.

grantedAbilities.name: Pack Loyalty
grantedAbilities.notes: Play the dog soldier as intensely loyal to trusted packmates and naturally inclined to work in a group.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Start with Hand to Hand: Martial Arts.

grantedAbilities.name: Breed and Mutation Tables
grantedAbilities.notes: Roll the optional breed and mutation tables during character creation if the group wants the full Dog Boy generation process.

grantedAbilities.name: Coalition versus Adventurer Gear
grantedAbilities.notes: Use Coalition issue armor, pay, and quarters for an active-duty dog soldier. Use the alternate adventurer kit, money, and social consequences for deserters and mercenaries.

unresolvedNotes: Roll the listed 1D4 P.E., 1D4 P.S., and 2D6 Spd increases during character creation. Breed and mutation tables may add more.
Roll 3D6 for permanent P.P.E. and M.E. plus 1D6x10 for starting I.S.P. during character creation.
Other-skill selections may also be spent on weapon proficiencies from the existing W.P. catalog; mixed skill-versus-W.P. spending stays table-managed.
Bionics and sensory cybernetics remain optional upgrades rather than starting defaults.

system.description: Master psychic who dominates the full range of psionic disciplines and grows into one of the setting's most feared minds.
system.notes: Play the Mind Melter as a high-powered psychic first and a technician second. The class relies on psionic choices more than gear.

occSkills.name: Language
occSkills.notes: Speak American and two additional languages at 90% proficiency.

grantedAbilities.name: Hand to Hand Training
grantedAbilities.notes: Start with Hand to Hand: Basic. Trade one other-skill pick for Expert, or two for Martial Arts (or Assassin for evil alignments).

grantedAbilities.name: Ley Line Amplification
grantedAbilities.notes: Increase range and duration by 50% near a ley line and double them near a nexus point. Psionic attack damage and telekinetic force fields also double near a nexus point.

grantedAbilities.name: Coalition Outlaw
grantedAbilities.notes: Mind Melters are forbidden entry into Coalition cities and are hunted aggressively by Psi-Stalkers and Dog Boys.

grantedAbilities.name: Techno-Wizard Curiosity
grantedAbilities.notes: Techno-wizard devices are easy to understand and may become favored tools, but the class still tends to rely on personal powers over machinery.

unresolvedNotes: Roll 2D4 for permanent P.P.E. and M.E. plus 3D6x10 for starting I.S.P. during character creation.
Other-skill selections may also be spent on weapon proficiencies from the existing W.P. catalog; mixed skill-versus-W.P. spending stays table-managed.
Starting money, black market goods, and favored equipment remain formula-based and should be rolled or chosen from the class text.
